ariaSpec.usage: Indicates that the list of drawer items is a menubar.
Indicates that the orientation of the drawer is vertical.
Indicates that the item of a drawer serves as a menuitem.
Indicates that the item of a drawer serves as a separator.

kbSpec.behavior: Goes to the previous item. Focus is moved to the prev item and its tabindex is set to 0.
Goes to the next item. Focus is moved to the next item and its tabindex is set to 0.
